title: pogostemon sampsonii
intro: Pogostemon sampsonii, also known as Patchouli, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from the essential oils extracted from its leaves. The health benefits of Pogostemon sampsonii include reducing stress, improving skin conditions, and supporting digestive health, among others. Herbal preparations of Pogostemon sampsonii include essential oils, teas, and tinctures that can be used topically or internally, depending on the desired application.
